docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIINO, JOE AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, PAMELA DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIINO, JOE SERVED OCT-17-1994, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, PAMELA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIINO, JOE AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, PAMELA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIINO, JOE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS, PAMELA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1050 FELL ST #4, LEASE FORFEITED

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $110.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIINO, JOE AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, PAMELA
DECLARATION OF JOE SIINO FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIINO, JOE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIINO, JOE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS, PAMELA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: [PREMISES RESTORED THROUGH CLERK JUDGMENT ON 25-NOV-94] $774.28 RENT, $240.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,124.28, LEASE FORFEITED
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, PAMELA
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIINO, JOE HEARING SET FOR JUN-27-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
NOTICE OF CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FILED BY DEFENDANT LEWIS, PAMELA
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, ADDRESS:1050 FELL ST, #5,SF 94117;TEL:(415)863-9806: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR SMITH, GREER MAUREENA AS ATTORNEY FOR SIINO, JOE

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, CALENDAR OF JUN-27-1995 GRANTED EXCEPT FOR THE SUM OF $125.00 TO BE WITHHELD FROM EACH PAY PERIOD. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE 1/2 EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR AND THE OTHER 1/2 TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,152.28 AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, PAMELA
